docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEVERA, MAGNOLIA B. AS TO DEFENDANT BURROW, DENISE M. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-24-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-24-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-09-2004
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR OCT-19-2004 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-10-2005 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE NOV-24-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-10-2005 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST MAGNOLIA B. DEVERA, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JAN-10-2005, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JAN-25-2005. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: ROMY BARULICH. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-10-2005 CONTINUED TO MAR-14-2005 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-14-2005 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST MAGNOLIA B. DEVERA, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAR-14-2005, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-29-2005. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: JOANN PRIOR, CSR	129. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-14-2005 CONTINUED TO MAY-16-2005 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-16-2005 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAY-16-2005 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: KATHY KOLLEHNER, CSR#4102. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
